memory_entries.text: In product dataset SQLite tasks, tables are grouped by suffix g1/g2/g3 (e.g., items_g*, fdbk_g*, attrs_g*, taxn_g*); first inspect schemas and sample category/taxonomy rows to map group to category.

In the product datasets SQLite DB, group mapping is: g1 is primarily Office Products, g2 is primarily Electronics, and g3 is primarily Musical Instruments. items_g3 has product price in prc and fdbk_g3 has per-review star rating in rtg joined by ref_id.
